new_classes.label_en: Liqueur and cordials, in containers holding > 2 l (CN 2208 70 90)
new_classes.label_de: Likör und Cordials, in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 l (KN 2208 70 90)
new_classes.definition_en: Liqueurs and cordials as defined under heading 2208, presented in containers holding more than 2 litres, classified under CN code 2208 70 90.

coverage_explanation: The two primary discriminating criteria for CN 2208 70 90 (vs. 2208 70 10) are: (1) the product is a liqueur or cordial (captured via LiqueurSpiritousQuality), and (2) the container holds more than 2 litres (captured via the LargeContainer restriction). The legal note references the HS Explanatory Notes for the substantive definition of liqueurs and cordials (compositional criteria such as added sweetening matter, flavouring, and spirit base), but these are not directly encodable as OWL datatype restrictions without introducing further quality classes or data properties not yet in the TBox. The production process (LiqueurProductionProcess) is already in the TBox but is not linked here as a restriction since LiqueurSpiritousQuality already identifies the product type. Coverage is slightly below 1.0 because the detailed HS EN compositional criteria (sugar content, flavouring substances, spirit base) referenced by the note cannot be fully formalised with the current TBox vocabulary.
